title: [People.ai] Fix meetings
description:
## Overview

* Sub-issue of [OPO-114](https://linear.app/testbox/issue/TOU-1042/peopleai-activities-data-should-respect-business-hours)
* Meeting activity data was generated without enforcing realistic time constraints, resulting in meetings appearing outside standard business hours and at arbitrary minute marks.
* This ticket covers fixing all existing meeting timestamps to fall within business hours and align to 15-minute intervals.

title: [DE Team] Create document with Linear Process
description:
We need to document the **end-to-end Linear workflow process** for the Data Engineering team.

The goal is to standardize how tickets are created, prioritized, tracked, and closed to ensure:

* Clear ownership
* Predictable timelines
* Reduced blockers
* Better stakeholder communication
* Improved delivery reliability

This document will serve as the **single source of truth** for how the team operates in Linear.

---

### Objectives

* Define ticket creation standards
* Clarify due date rules
*

title: [DE Team] Create High-Level Diagram of Agentic Data Generation for Monarch
description:
### **Description**

We need a **high-level drawing** that illustrates what an **agentic synthetic data generation system** would look like end-to-end.

This is a conceptual alignment artifact for leadership + engineering. It should communicate:

* The main stages (discovery → mapping → modeling → generation → validation → iteration)
* Where “agents” operate vs where humans approve
* The quality/validation gates that prevent bad outputs from shipping

This is **not** an implementation design.

-

title: [DE Team] Define Minimum Information Required from GTM for Project Estimation
description:
### **Description**

We need to define and document the **minimum set of information** that GTM must provide so Data Engineering can **estimate the effort of a synthetic data project**.

The goal is **not** to estimate delivery yet — the goal is to make clear:

* What information is required for estimation
* What happens when that information is missing
* How incomplete inputs increase estimation time and risk

This will be used to set expectations with GTM and avoid estimation churn, back-and-f

title: [DE Team] Create Internal Feedback Form
description:
### **Description**

We need to create a Google Form to support the internal feedback and self-review process for the Data Engineering team.

The form will be used by engineers to complete structured self-reviews based on the approved evaluation framework, and later compared with manager reviews.

The goal is to make feedback:

* Consistent
* Easy to complete
* Easy to analyze over time
* Aligned with delivery quality and growth expectations

---

### **Scope / Requirements**

title: Create pending records for Scorecards - [People.ai] Synthetic Data Generation Request
description:
## **1. Summary**

Generate missing scorecard records for the People.ai dataset. During implementation of the scorecard feature, we identified that several opportunities in the dataset are missing scorecard records or are missing specific template lines within existing scorecards. Additionally, three new deals (IDs 374, 373, 372) were recently created and need full scorecard records generated. The data engineer needs to create and add the missing records directly to the Hasura stable dataset.

title: Create Contacts for Business Units for data coherence
description: Create 10 contacts per Business Unit to add coherence to Risk Data

title: [People.ai] Activities data should respect business hours
description:
## Overview

Currently, activity data (meetings and emails) was generated without enforcing realistic business hour constraints, resulting in activities appearing at unrealistic times.

This ticket covers updating the data generation logic so that all activities fall within appropriate business hour windows.

When fixing existing data, the original chronological order and date must be preserved — activities are shifted into valid time windows on the same day without reordering.

This ticket aims to finish structuring all tables that require translations to enable the new multi-language dataset. This will allow the dev team to begin implementation work for supporting multiple languages (English + Japanese) in Staircase.

**Business Context:** We need to expand Staircase to support Japanese, using the existing English dataset as a baseline. This task establishes the standard structure for multilingual datasets that can be extended to future languages.

title: [Archer] Extract Field Metadata to XLSX
description:
Create a script that extracts the `Name`, `Description`, `Formula`, and `Value` fields from a JSON or TXT file and organizes the information into columns in an XLSX file. 
The `formula` will only exist if the `IsCalculated` field is `True`. All calculation-related information must be consolidated into the same column in the table. The file `type` should only be extracted when it is a `value`.

title: [Archer] - Structure many-to-many relationships in a standardized way
description:
## **1. Summary**

Define a standard format for representing M2M relationships in Archer datasets. This specification ensures all M2M relationships are provided using explicit junction tables rather than embedded arrays, comma-separated values, or other non-normalized formats. The actual identification of which relationships require M2M treatment will be determined during this discovery process.

---

title: [GONG] Ensure consistency between objects' stories (events)
description:
## Overview

Our current synthetic data generation for Gong does not accurately represent real customer behavior throughout the sales cycle. The deal flow and event sequencing—spanning emails, calls, meetings, and Salesforce deal updates—lack logical continuity, resulting in simulations that feel artificial and disconnected.

Because events across all objects are not contextually linked, the generated data fails to tell a coherent and believable story. This impacts the quality, reliability, and

title: [GONG][SPIKE] Dataset contains unused or obsolete fields
[GONG] Documentation Business Rule
description:
## Overview

Our current synthetic data generation workflow lacks well-defined and centralized business rules. This makes it difficult to generate data consistently and predictably across objects such as emails, calls, meetings, and deals.

Because the business logic is fragmented, unclear, and sometimes undocumented, the team struggles to maintain or extend the generation flow, resulting in inconsistencies, misalignment across objects, and divergent interpretations of how synthetic data *should
